scenarios.title: Buy Bread at a Bakery
scenarios.description: A short A1 exchange for buying bread and paying politely.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Ask for one item, understand the price, and say thank you.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Morgen. Was möchten Sie?

translations.text: Good morning. What would you like?
صبح به خیر. چه چیزی میل دارید؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ich möchte ein Brot, bitte.

translations.text: I would like one bread, please.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Das macht drei Euro.
Danke schön. Auf Wiedersehen.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this polite pattern when ordering one item.
Use this when you need the price.

scenarios.title: Ask for Help at a Pharmacy
scenarios.description: A simple pharmacy conversation for explaining a basic need.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Say that you need help and ask for something for a headache.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Tag. Ich brauche Hilfe.
Was fehlt Ihnen?
Ich habe Kopfschmerzen.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use when you need support in a shop, office, or pharmacy.
Use for a simple symptom.

scenarios.title: Call in Sick at Work
scenarios.description: An A2 workplace call for saying you are sick and asking what to send.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Inform a colleague or manager that you are sick and ask about the next step.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Morgen. Ich bin heute krank und kann nicht ins Büro kommen.

translations.text: Good morning. I am sick today and cannot come to the office.
صبح به خیر. امروز مریض هستم و نمی‌توانم به دفتر بیایم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Danke für die Information. Schicken Sie bitte eine kurze Nachricht an das Team.

translations.text: Thanks for the information. Please send a short message to the team.
ممنون از اطلاع‌رسانی. لطفاً یک پیام کوتاه برای تیم بفرستید.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Muss ich eine Bescheinigung senden?

translations.text: Do I need to send a certificate?

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this short sentence when informing work or school.
Use when asking about a required document.

translations.text: Do I need to send a certificate?

questions.prompt: Warum kommt die Person nicht ins Büro?

translations.text: Why is the person not coming to the office?
چرا آن شخص به دفتر نمی‌آید؟

scenarios.title: Reschedule a Delivery Time
scenarios.description: An A2 logistics call for changing a pickup or delivery appointment.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Explain that a time does not work and suggest a new time.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Der Abholtermin ist morgen um acht Uhr.

translations.text: The pickup appointment is tomorrow at eight.
زمان تحویل گرفتن فردا ساعت هشت است.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Um acht Uhr passt es leider nicht. Geht es um zehn Uhr?

translations.text: Eight o'clock unfortunately does not work. Is ten o'clock possible?
ساعت هشت متأسفانه مناسب نیست. ساعت ده ممکن است؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, ich ändere den Termin auf zehn Uhr.

translations.text: Yes, I will change the appointment to ten o'clock.
بله، زمان را به ساعت ده تغییر می‌دهم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this polite sentence when a proposed time does not work.
Use to suggest another time.

questions.prompt: Welche neue Zeit schlägt die Person vor?

translations.text: Which new time does the person suggest?
آن شخص چه زمان جدیدی پیشنهاد می‌دهد؟

answers.feedback: Eight o'clock was the original time.

scenarios.title: First Language-Practice Meeting
scenarios.description: A simple first exchange for meeting a language partner and agreeing on slow practice.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Introduce yourself, state your German level, and ask to practice slowly.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Hallo, bist du auch zum Deutsch üben hier?

translations.text: Hello, are you also here to practice German?
سلام، تو هم برای تمرین آلمانی اینجا هستی؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, ich lerne Deutsch. Ich bin A1.

translations.text: Yes, I am learning German. I am A1.
بله، من آلمانی یاد می‌گیرم. سطح من A1 است.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Sollen wir langsam sprechen?
Ja, bitte. Das hilft mir sehr.

translations.text: Yes, please. That helps me a lot.
بله، لطفاً. این خیلی به من کمک می‌کند.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this to explain your current learning situation.
Use this when you need slower practice.

translations.text: What does the learner ask for?

answers.feedback: This is not in the dialogue.

scenarios.title: Introduce Yourself in Simple German
scenarios.description: A short A1 introduction with name, country, city, and one learning goal.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Say who you are and why you are learning German.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Wie heißt du?
Ich heiße Sara. Ich komme aus Iran.

translations.text: My name is Sara. I come from Iran.
اسم من سارا است. من از ایران می‌آیم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Wo wohnst du jetzt?
Ich wohne in Berlin. Ich lerne Deutsch für den Alltag.

translations.text: I live in Berlin. I am learning German for daily life.
من در برلین زندگی می‌کنم. برای زندگی روزمره آلمانی یاد می‌گیرم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this for your name.
Use this to explain your learning goal.

scenarios.title: Ask Someone to Speak Slowly
scenarios.description: A polite A1 repair phrase for conversations that are too fast.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Ask someone to repeat and speak slowly without stopping the conversation.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Wir treffen uns morgen um halb sechs am Bahnhof.

translations.text: We are meeting tomorrow at half past five at the station.
ما فردا ساعت پنج و نیم در ایستگاه همدیگر را می‌بینیم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Entschuldigung, das war zu schnell.
Kein Problem. Morgen um halb sechs.

translations.text: No problem. Tomorrow at half past five.
اشکالی ندارد. فردا ساعت پنج و نیم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Danke. Können Sie bitte langsam sprechen?

translations.text: Thank you. Can you please speak slowly?
ممنون. می‌توانید لطفاً آهسته صحبت کنید؟

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this when you missed the sentence.
Use the formal version with strangers or officials.

translations.text: آن شخص خیلی سریع صحبت کرد.

scenarios.title: Ask for Correction Politely
scenarios.description: A short practice exchange for asking a partner to correct mistakes.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Invite correction and respond politely when someone helps.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ich möchte besser sprechen.
Das ist gut. Soll ich dich korrigieren?

translations.text: That is good. Should I correct you?
خوب است. آیا تو را اصلاح کنم؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, bitte korrigiere mich.

translations.text: بله، لطفاً من را اصلاح کن.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Gern. Wir üben langsam.

translations.text: با کمال میل. آهسته تمرین می‌کنیم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use with a partner you address with du.
Use the formal version.

translations.text: می‌توانید لطفاً من را اصلاح کنید؟

scenarios.title: Talk to a Doctor
scenarios.description: An A2 doctor visit for describing symptoms and understanding simple advice.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Describe pain, answer how long it has lasted, and understand the next step.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Was fehlt Ihnen?
Ich habe seit gestern Kopfschmerzen und Fieber.

translations.text: I have had a headache and fever since yesterday.
از دیروز سردرد و تب دارم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ich untersuche Sie kurz. Trinken Sie viel Wasser.

translations.text: I will examine you briefly. Drink a lot of water.
کمی شما را معاینه می‌کنم. آب زیاد بنوشید.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Brauche ich ein Rezept?

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this to say when symptoms started.
Use this to ask about a prescription.

translations.text: Which symptoms does the person mention?
آن شخص چه علائمی را می‌گوید؟

answers.feedback: Those are not symptoms in this dialogue.

scenarios.title: Write to Kindergarten or School
scenarios.description: A2 phrases for writing a short message about absence or a question.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Write a polite message to a teacher or office.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Morgen, wie kann ich helfen?

translations.text: Good morning, how can I help?
صبح به خیر، چطور می‌توانم کمک کنم؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Mein Kind ist heute krank und kommt nicht in den Kindergarten.

translations.text: My child is sick today and is not coming to kindergarten.
فرزندم امروز بیمار است و به کودکستان نمی‌آید.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Danke für die Nachricht. Gute Besserung.

translations.text: Thank you for the message. Get well soon.
ممنون بابت پیام. امیدوارم زودتر بهتر شود.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Vielen Dank. Morgen melde ich mich wieder.

translations.text: Thank you very much. I will contact you again tomorrow.
خیلی ممنون. فردا دوباره خبر می‌دهم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this in a school or kindergarten message.
Use this to promise an update.

translations.text: I will contact you again tomorrow.
Why is the child not coming?

scenarios.title: Call an Office for an Appointment
scenarios.description: An A2 phone call for asking about an appointment and confirming the time.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Ask for an appointment, spell your name if needed, and repeat the date.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Praxis Müller, guten Tag.
Guten Tag. Ich brauche einen Termin.

translations.text: سلام. من یک وقت ملاقات لازم دارم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Wir haben am Dienstag um zehn Uhr einen Termin frei.

translations.text: We have an appointment free on Tuesday at ten.
سه‌شنبه ساعت ده یک وقت خالی داریم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Dienstag um zehn Uhr passt. Vielen Dank.

translations.text: Tuesday at ten works. Thank you very much.
سه‌شنبه ساعت ده مناسب است. خیلی ممنون.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this when calling an office.

translations.text: من یک وقت ملاقات لازم دارم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this to confirm a proposed time.

answers.feedback: The office says Tuesday at ten.

scenarios.title: Talk to a Landlord
scenarios.description: An A2 housing conversation for reporting a repair problem politely.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Explain a problem in the apartment and ask when it can be repaired.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Tag. Die Heizung funktioniert nicht.

translations.text: Hello. The heating does not work.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Seit wann ist das Problem?

translations.text: Since when has this been a problem?
این مشکل از کی وجود دارد؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Seit gestern Abend. Es ist sehr kalt.

translations.text: Since yesterday evening. It is very cold.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ich rufe heute eine Firma an.

translations.text: I will call a company today.
امروز با یک شرکت تماس می‌گیرم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this to report a heating problem.
Use this to say when a problem started.

scenarios.title: Workplace Small Talk
scenarios.description: A friendly A2 workplace exchange before the day starts.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Ask a colleague about the weekend and continue with one follow-up question.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Morgen. Wie war dein Wochenende?

translations.text: Good morning. How was your weekend?
صبح به خیر. آخر هفته‌ات چطور بود؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Gut, danke. Ich war mit meiner Familie im Park.

translations.text: Good, thanks. I was in the park with my family.
خوب بود، ممنون. با خانواده‌ام در پارک بودم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Schön. Hast du heute viel zu tun?

translations.text: Nice. Do you have a lot to do today?
چه خوب. امروز کار زیادی داری؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, aber zuerst brauche ich einen Kaffee.

translations.text: Yes, but first I need a coffee.
بله، ولی اول یک قهوه لازم دارم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this with colleagues you know.

usefulPhrases.baseText: Hast du heute viel zu tun?
usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this as a light follow-up at work.

translations.text: Do you have a lot to do today?

questions.prompt: Wo war die Person am Wochenende?

translations.text: Where was the person on the weekend?
آن شخص آخر هفته کجا بود؟

scenarios.title: Job Interview Basics
scenarios.description: An A2 interview opening for introducing experience and asking one question.
scenarios.learnerGoal: Answer a basic interview question and ask about working hours.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Erzählen Sie bitte kurz von sich.

translations.text: Please tell me briefly about yourself.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ich habe zwei Jahre Erfahrung im Verkauf.

translations.text: I have two years of experience in sales.
من دو سال تجربه در فروش دارم.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Warum möchten Sie bei uns arbeiten?

translations.text: Why would you like to work with us?
چرا می‌خواهید پیش ما کار کنید؟

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ich suche eine Stelle mit Kundenkontakt. Wie sind die Arbeitszeiten?

translations.text: I am looking for a job with customer contact. What are the working hours?
دنبال کاری با ارتباط با مشتری هستم. ساعت‌های کاری چگونه است؟

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this to summarize experience.
Use this to ask about work hours.

translations.text: What experience does the person mention?
آن شخص چه تجربه‌ای را نام می‌برد؟

answers.feedback: That is not in the interview.

conversationStarterPacks.title: Cafe First Meeting Starters
conversationStarterPacks.description: Simple friendly openers for a first short conversation in a cafe.

phrases.usageNote: Use this as a simple first introduction.
phrases.commonMistake: Do not omit ich in a full sentence.

phrases.usageNote: Use Sie with adults or people you do not know well.

conversationStarterPacks.title: Workplace Small Talk Starters
conversationStarterPacks.description: Friendly A2 phrases for opening a short conversation at work.

phrases.usageNote: Use with colleagues you address with du.

phrases.baseText: Hast du heute viel zu tun?
phrases.usageNote: Use for light workplace small talk.
alternativeBaseTexts: Haben Sie heute viel zu tun?

translations.text: Do you have a lot to do today?

conversationStarterPacks.title: Online Practice Meeting Starters
conversationStarterPacks.description: Useful starters for joining an online German practice session.

phrases.usageNote: Use at the start of an online call.
Use when audio or meaning is unclear.

translations.text: می‌توانی لطفاً آن را تکرار کنی؟

conversationStarterPacks.title: School and Kindergarten Parent Starters
conversationStarterPacks.description: Polite A2 phrases for short parent messages and school conversations.

phrases.usageNote: Use in a short absence message.

phrases.baseText: Können Sie mir bitte kurz antworten?
phrases.usageNote: Use when you need a short reply.

translations.text: Could you please answer me briefly?
می‌توانید لطفاً کوتاه به من پاسخ دهید؟

conversationStarterPacks.title: Neighbor Small Talk Starters
conversationStarterPacks.description: Simple friendly A1 phrases for greeting a neighbor.

phrases.baseText: Guten Morgen, wie geht es Ihnen?
phrases.usageNote: Use with neighbors you do not know well.

translations.text: صبح به خیر، حال شما چطور است؟

phrases.usageNote: Use as a very simple small-talk sentence.

eventPreparationPacks.title: Cafe First Meeting Preparation
eventPreparationPacks.description: Prepare a simple first introduction and one polite follow-up question before a cafe practice meetup.
openingPrompts: Say your name and ask for the other person's name.
Order one simple item before you introduce yourself.
roleplayPrompts: Practice a two-minute cafe introduction with one follow-up question.
reviewPrompts: Write one phrase you want to reuse at the next meetup.

eventPreparationPacks.title: Workplace Small Talk Preparation
eventPreparationPacks.description: Prepare friendly A2 small-talk questions for colleagues before a short workplace conversation.
openingPrompts: Ask a friendly question about the weekend.
Ask whether your colleague has a busy day.
roleplayPrompts: Practice a short office kitchen conversation with two follow-up questions.
reviewPrompts: Note which question sounded natural and which one felt difficult.

eventPreparationPacks.title: Online Practice Meeting Preparation
eventPreparationPacks.description: Prepare clarification phrases and check-in questions for an online German practice session.
openingPrompts: Check whether the other person can hear you well.
roleplayPrompts: Practice asking someone to repeat a sentence during a video call.
reviewPrompts: Write one clarification phrase you used successfully.

eventPreparationPacks.title: School and Kindergarten Parent Preparation
eventPreparationPacks.description: Prepare a short parent message and one polite question for school or kindergarten.
openingPrompts: Say that your child is sick today.
roleplayPrompts: Practice calling the school office and giving one update.
reviewPrompts: Write the message you would send next time.

eventPreparationPacks.title: Neighbor Small Talk Preparation
eventPreparationPacks.description: Prepare two simple lines for greeting a neighbor politely.
openingPrompts: Greet a neighbor and ask how they are.
reviewPrompts: Write one sentence that felt easy to say.
